opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My shoulder and my knee both slipped out of place a few hours ago and now the muscle spasms have locked me up in absolute agony. I'm stuck on the floor and I'm too scared to move in case they go again.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly this afternoon, I can't get myself up, and I live on my own so there's no one here to help me.

symptom_narrative.onset: about four hours ago, after I moved a bit awkwardly
symptom_narrative.duration: the last four hours or so
symptom_narrative.character: the joints felt like they popped out and then slid back on their own, and now there's this gripping, cramping spasm in the muscles around them that won't let go
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: honestly the worst it has ever been — the spasms are agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my left shoulder and my right knee, and all the muscles around them
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, and much worse if I try to move at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: staying completely still takes the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and trying to shift my weight to get up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mainly just the pain and the cramping — nothing else I can think of right now
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my joints partly slip out fairly often, but never this bad or this many at the same time
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get up off the floor, I can't get to the kitchen for water, and I'm on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: hypermobile EDS — my joints are really loose and slip out easily
past_medical_history.how_managed: physio and pacing, and I brace the joints when it flares up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: early arthritis in the same shoulder and knee

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing regular, and no painkillers in the house at the moment

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, and there is no one else at home to help right now

objective_data_offered.value: on the floor, holding my left arm tight against my chest and keeping my right leg slightly bent; clearly in a lot of pain
around 100 beats per minute on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading, likely raised by the pain and distress
